title: Thy Will Be Done
overview: A salt of the earth, inner-city detective, 'Stefani Bennett' is assigned to a complex rash of deaths. While trying to understand her gift of clairvoyance, she seeks guidance from her late Father's Police partner, and long time family spiritual leader, Father Arland Anthony.
